MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Karen Farnsworth. Richard J. Alexander, Esq. represented Plaintiff, The John Stewart Company and Defendant Barry Thornton was represented by Peter Hadiaris, Esq. The case settled per oral stipulation of parties, read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
